ecosystem.title: One SoloBeauté, three winners
ecosystem.subtitle: We solve pain points for every role in the beauty industry

host.pain: Your space is great — but it sits empty. No steady renters, no good management tools.
host.desc: 3D tours that make pros fall in love with your space. Smart pricing that finds the sweet spot. Automated management so you can stop refreshing your phone.

beautician.pain: Locked into expensive monthly leases, or scrambling to find last-minute spaces? You deserve better.
beautician.desc: Rent when you have clients, rest when you don't. Build your own brand page — let clients follow you, not the salon.

consumer.pain: Want a great nail artist but your only options are word-of-mouth or luck. Booking is opaque, pricing uncertain.
consumer.desc: Verified reviews, transparent pricing, secure payments — beauty on your terms

hostSteps.title: List Your Space
hostSteps.desc: Upload photos, set availability & pricing. 3D tours make your space stand out

hostSteps.title: Accept Bookings
hostSteps.desc: Pros browse and book your space. Get notified automatically

hostSteps.title: Earn Passively
hostSteps.desc: Secure payments settled automatically. Focus on what matters

beauticianSteps.title: Find a Space
beauticianSteps.desc: Search by map, filter by equipment — find the perfect workspace

beauticianSteps.title: Book & Go
beauticianSteps.desc: Flexible hourly bookings. Start seeing clients the same day

beauticianSteps.title: Build Your Brand

items.title: Map Search
items.desc: Open the app and see every rentable beauty space nearby. Pricing, distance, equipment — all at a glance. No more calling around.

items.title: Smart Filters
items.desc: Need a beauty bed or a nail table? Want a shampoo station or a 3D tour? Set your filters, and we'll narrow it down to your perfect match.

items.title: In-App Chat
items.desc: Found a space you like? Message the host directly. "Do you provide towels?" "Is parking easy?" Get answers before you book.

items.title: Booking Management
items.desc: Your schedule at a glance: Da'an District today, Zhongshan tomorrow. Pending, confirmed, completed — three statuses, crystal clear.

about.title:
Let's build the future
of beauty together.
about.desc: SoloBeauté wasn't dreamed up in an office. Jasper writes the code, Meigo works the market — one knows technology, the other knows the industry. We believe great beauty services aren't built with more features, but by people who truly understand the trade.
about.founder1Desc: Started as a beauty professional, managed studios, built industry connections. Now uses that frontline experience and network to match the right spaces with the right pros on SoloBeauté.

faq.title: Things you might want to know

items.q: Do beauty pros need to pay to join?
items.a: Joining SoloBeauté is completely free. You only pay a small service fee when a booking is completed. Early bird pros enjoy 3 months commission-free.

items.q: Is renting out my space safe?
items.a: All bookings go through the platform with identity verification and a complete booking record. Hosts can freely accept or decline bookings and set their own rental rules.
During the early stage, transactions are handled in cash on-site for simplicity. Secure online payments are coming soon, with full transaction protection.

items.q: When can consumers start using the app?
items.a: The consumer side is coming soon. We are building up enough pros and spaces first to ensure a great experience at launch.

items.q: I'm just starting out — can I still use SoloBeauté?
items.a: Absolutely. SoloBeauté exists to lower the barrier to going independent. No long-term lease, no deposit, no renovation costs. Just rent a space when you have a client, and relax when you don't.

items.q: What do hosts need to get started?
items.a: Space photos, available time slots, and your desired pricing — that's it. If you're not great at photography, we can help. The whole setup process takes about 30 minutes.

items.q: How is SoloBeauté different from other shared spaces?
items.a: We don't just help you find a space. SoloBeauté also helps pros build personal brand pages, manage bookings, and organize their portfolio and brand presence. And our team has real beauty industry experience — Meigo is a former pro himself, so we understand your needs firsthand.

cta.title: Your next step starts here
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a host looking to rent out your space, or a pro ready to go independent — SoloBeauté is where you begin.
cta.iosHint: Currently available on iOS. Android coming soon.
